eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Cherokee; Creek; McIntosh; Mayes; Muskogee; Okfuskee; Okmulgee; Osage; Pawnee; Rogers; Tulsa; Wagoner; Washington, OK; at 3:59 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 9:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
